productDisplayName: Puma Men's YugoRun White Red Shoe
description: Comfortable and stylish, these Yugorun shoes from puma are created in a sleek design. It's high performance factor makes the Yugorun a formidable running pair. This pair looks great when teamed up with jeans and tees.Upper Lightweight air mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and structure Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Mesh tongue for breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Embroidered logo on the tongue, heel cap and side vamp to create a fashion statement Formstripe on the side for added structure Midsole idCELL midsole provides extra cushioning for maximum comfort and support Ortholite footbed for breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Outsole Evertrack rubber outsole for durability Flex grooves for flexibility and natural movement of the feet
